terms.title: Default Terms & Conditions
terms.label: Terms Text
terms.description: Set default terms and conditions that will appear on new invoices. You can still edit this for individual invoices.
terms.placeholder: Enter your default terms and conditions...
terms.tipText: Include payment terms, late fees, accepted payment methods, and any other important information your clients should know.

messages.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
messages.settingsSavedDescription: Your invoice preferences have been updated successfully.
messages.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Please select a company first.
messages.requiredFieldsMissing: Template, currency, and tax are required. Please fill in all required fields.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your data as an SQL backup file or restore from a previous backup.
backup.exportDescription: Download a full SQL backup of your companies, clients, invoices, and settings.
backup.importDescription: Upload a previously exported .sql file to restore your data.
backup.importNote: Duplicates will be detected before importing
backup.exportError: Failed to export backup. Please try again.
backup.importSuccess: Backup imported successfully. Your data has been restored.
backup.importPartial: {{imported}} of {{total}} records imported. {{skipped}} already existed in your database.
backup.importAlreadyExists: All records in this backup already exist in your database. Nothing was imported.
backup.importError: Failed to import backup. The file may be invalid or corrupted.
backup.importConfirmMessage: Importing a backup will merge data into your account. Existing records with the same name will be skipped. Are you sure you want to continue?
backup.warningText: Importing a backup will add new records and skip any that already exist. Make sure you have a recent export before proceeding.
backup.previewSubtitle: {{newCount}} new records, {{conflictCount}} conflicts with existing data.
backup.noConflicts: No conflicts found. All records in this backup are new and will be added.

duplicates.title: Duplicate Check
duplicates.subtitle: Find and remove duplicate records in your data
duplicates.checkError: Failed to check for duplicates. Please try again.
duplicates.allClean: Your data is clean — no duplicate records were detected.
duplicates.deleteError: Failed to delete record. Please try again.
duplicates.instruction: {{count}} duplicate records found. Choose which one(s) to delete.

exchangeRates.title: Exchange Rates
exchangeRates.subtitle: Customize exchange rates for your dashboard. Changes only affect your view, not the system currencies.
exchangeRates.customNote: You have {{count}} custom rate(s). These are saved with your settings and only affect your dashboard.
